text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click, clack...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure I was training with Manhattan Cafe a
minute ago...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So how did I end up in a place like this?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
This place is a fleeting dream... A chasm in time...
where thoughts bend and intersect...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Right now, something is crying, drowning in sadness... Their sadness runs deep, and it's strong enough to power this train...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surprised, I turn to the window and see the night
sky stretching out before me endlessly. She's
right. This sure isn't the real world...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice that the train's beginning to pick up
speed. Where could it be taking us?

text_block_list.name: Announcement?
text_block_list.text:
The next station is Frutetinifni... I repeat,
Frutetinifni...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Doesn't sound like any station I know... It must stand for something... their desire maybe... An endless yearning...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Think hard about the station name... then decide
whether or not to get off the train...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Do so, and I'm sure that something will—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Creak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before she can finish speaking, the train
screeches to a halt and cuts her off. Outside the
window, I see slopes, a dirt track, and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe really urged me to think about
the name of this place. And that's why I'm going
to...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Frutetinifni... What if... Acting on a gut feeling, I
decide to get off the train.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I step off and, instead of falling down a
bottomless pit, find myself on solid ground.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer... There you are.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's that white stuff?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spin around in a panic to see that, sure enough,
something like a white mist is rising up behind me.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I understand now... If you read "Frutetinifni"
backwards... you get "infinite turf."

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: The something that's in this dream... it wanted to visit this place one more time, and not alone either.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: And now its dream has come true... Farewell...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The white mist dissipates into a shimmer of
sparkles and fades away into the sky. Whatever
that was, it seems to have found peace and
moved on.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
You really are a kind person... Today reminded
me of that.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Yes... You accept the existence of those you
cannot see... and you lend an ear to their voices...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'm not the only one who's grateful for that...
That's become very clear to me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If anything, I feel like Manhattan Cafe's efforts to
understand and advocate for the mysterious show
more kindness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling that I probably shouldn't get off yet, I
choose to stay on the train. Before long, it begins
to move again...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click, clack...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click, clack. Click, clack.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It is just me or... is the train getting faster?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click, clack! Click, clack! Click, clack!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment I realize the gravity of the situation,
I feel as if I've been sent flying through the air.
And that's when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clatter, clatter, clatter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stumble right onto the central plaza and notice
several students running this way! If they come
any closer...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe darts to my side and saves me
just in the nick of time...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I understand the dream now... If you read
"Frutetinifni" backwards, you get "infinite turf."

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: The something that's in this dream... it wants to visit that place one more time, and not alone either. Let's go...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I knew it. This is where you wanted to come,
isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I hope you find peace, no matter how fleeting it
might be... Farewell.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The white mist dissipates into a shimmer of
sparkles and fades away into the sky. Whatever
that was, it seems to have found peace and
moved on.
choice_data_list: I can't believe you figured out what it wanted.
I can't believe you figured out what it wanted.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
They're fragile, only a moment from
disappearing...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I want to share their feelings as best as I can,
before they fade away...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Manhattan Cafe talks about her efforts to
connect with the strange and mysterious, I sense a
deep kindness in her.
